name: bahay-ni-kuya
description: Boarding House Management System for Bahay ni Kuya (Vite + React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL)

scripts.install:all: npm ci && npm --prefix server ci && npm --prefix client ci
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && npm --prefix server run prisma:deploy && npm --prefix server run seed
scripts.db:reset: npm --prefix server run prisma:deploy && npm --prefix server run seed:reset
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
